chapter_title.en: The Call to Prayer and the Establishment of Prayer and the Reward of the Muezzins

text: 901 - وَ رَوَى أَبُو بَصِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: «إِذَا أَذَّنْتَ فِي اَلطَّرِيقِ أَوْ فِي بَيْتِكَ ثُمَّ أَقَمْتَ فِي اَلْمَسْجِدِ أَجْزَأَكَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.901 - Abu Basir narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) that He said:
"If you give the adhan (call to prayer) on the road or in your home, and then perform the iqamah (second call to prayer) in the mosque, it suffices."
